text.title: Agent Shape Decision Frame Decision Tree

question.text: Does any tool mutate production state?

branch.conclusion: Single-turn single-agent with human-gate before mutating call.
Single-turn single-agent. Smallest shape; no ceremony.

question.text: Is total tool count > 25 OR are there ≥2 distinct expertise domains?
Is an eval surface (golden set + pass-rate) available?

branch.conclusion: Multi-agent. Tool count or domain split justifies it; eval gate exists.
Escalate — multi-agent without evals fails in production.

question.text: Is the deployment surface end-user CLI for coding/devops?

branch.conclusion: Use Claude Code headless. Cheaper, battle-tested.

example.p: multi-turn → not multi-agent → deployment custom → conclusion: multi-turn-single-agent.
